name: vertex_scoring
description: Nightly quality scoring — samples recent agent spans and runs Vertex Gen AI Evaluation (groundedness, coherence, tool_use_quality). Writes scores back to Firestore + Phoenix span attributes for the dashboard.
notes: Cloud Scheduler hits this endpoint nightly. Request body comes from the span-sampler that pulls the last 24h of OpenInference spans from Phoenix and stratifies by agent name. Scorer is fail-soft: when google-cloud-aiplatform is unavailable or VERTEX_SCORING_ENABLED=false, the endpoint returns {enabled:false} without error.
